canonical_question: How do I implement CQRS and Event Sourcing?
aliases: event sourcing with separate read write models
separate read and write side architecture
how to build an event sourced system
constraints: Never use CQRS as a top-level architecture for the entire system
Event schemas are your API contract — never modify published event schemas
Event stores must be append-only — never update or delete events
Projections must be rebuildable from scratch
Do not use CQRS without operational maturity
